info.name: Travel Forum API - Test and Demo (Final) Copy
info.description: Updated against the current controllers. Request names include expected HTTP status codes. All seeded/demo passwords default to Travel123!. Includes password change and automatic restore flow.

exec: pm.test("Response is an array with at most 10 posts", function () { const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.be.an("array"); pm.expect(j.length).to.be.at.most(10); });
pm.test("Response is an array with at most 10 posts", function () { const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.be.an("array"); pm.expect(j.length).to.be.at.most(10); });

request.description: Current controller returns 200. Change expected status to 201 after adding @ResponseStatus(CREATED).

exec: pm.test("Has validation errors", function () { const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property("errors"); });

item.name: T06 [401] Reject posts request without credentials
T07 [200] List posts with user credentials
T20 [403] Reject user list request from normal user

exec: pm.test("Post response fields exist", function () { const j = pm.response.json(); ["id","title","content","authorUsername","likesCount","commentsCount"].forEach(k => pm.expect(j).to.have.property(k)); });

item.name: T10 [200] Search posts by most liked
T10b [200] Search posts by most commented

exec: pm.test("Counts start at zero", function () { pm.expect(j.likesCount).to.eql(0); pm.expect(j.commentsCount).to.eql(0); });

item.name: T14 [403] Reject post update by non-owner
T19 [403] Reject post creation by blocked user
T16a [200] Get comments for a post

exec: pm.test("Returned comment has the captured ID", function () { const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(String(j.id)).to.eql(String(pm.environment.get("createdCommentId"))); });

item.name: T18a [201] Add like to created post

exec: pm.test("Like count is at least 1", function () { pm.expect(Number(pm.response.text())).to.be.at.least(1); });

request.description: The current service silently returns when the same user already liked the post.

item.name: T18e [403] Reject like from blocked user

exec: pm.test("Returns logged-in user", function () { const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.username).to.eql(pm.environment.get("userUsername")); });

request.description: Changes the dynamically registered demo account password and updates demoCurrentPassword so later requests can authenticate.

item.name: T21c [200] Search users by first name
T21e [403] Reject post update by blocked user

body.raw:
{
        "authorUsername": "danieltravels",
        "commentsCount": 2,
        "content": "Why did I get blocked? I don't want to be blocked. Ask admin to unblock me.",
        "createdAt": "2026-05-01T10:35:00",
        "id": 11,
        "likesCount": 3,
        "title": "I nearly booked the wrong airport for my London trip"
    }

item.name: T21g [200] Get user by ID as administrator
T21h [200] Get user by username as administrator

request.description: Optional demo step. Use a disposable target user because promotion is persistent.

item.name: T99b [204] Delete any post as admin

variable.description: Original password restored after demo password-change testing.
